sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.

feat.name: Advanced Monastic Weaponry
feat.text: Your rigorous training regimen allows you to wield complex weaponry with ease. For the purposes of proficiency, you treat advanced monk weapons as if they were martial monk weapons.

traits.name: Monk
traits.text: Abilities with this trait are from the monk class. A weapon with this trait is primarily used by monks.

archetype.name: Martial Artist
archetype.note: This archetype offers Advanced Monastic Weaponry at a different level than displayed here.
